<script>
(() => {
  const canvas = document.getElementById("game");
  const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
  const scoreEl = document.getElementById("score");
  const bestEl = document.getElementById("best");
  const speedEl = document.getElementById("speed");
  const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay");
  const startBtn = document.getElementById("startBtn");
  const leftBtn = document.getElementById("leftBtn");
  const rightBtn = document.getElementById("rightBtn");
  const slowBtn = document.getElementById("slowBtn");

  let W = 0, H = 0, DPR = 1;
  function resize() {
    DPR = Math.max(1, Math.min(2, window.devicePixelRatio || 1));
    W = window.innerWidth;
    H = window.innerHeight;
    canvas.width = Math.floor(W * DPR);
    canvas.height = Math.floor(H * DPR);
    canvas.style.width = W + "px";
    canvas.style.height = H + "px";
    ctx.setTransform(DPR, 0, 0, DPR, 0, 0);
    roadW = Math.min(W * 0.62, 520);
    roadX = (W - roadW) * 0.5;
  }
  window.addEventListener("resize", resize);

  const keys = new Set();
  window.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
    keys.add(e.code);
    if (!running && (e.code === "Enter" || e.code === "Space")) startGame();
    if (["ArrowUp", "ArrowDown", "ArrowLeft", "ArrowRight", "Space"].includes(e.code)) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }
  }, { passive: false });
  window.addEventListener("keyup", (e) => keys.delete(e.code));

  const pointerState = {
    active: false,
    x: 0,
    y: 0,
    id: null
  };

  canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", (e) => {
    pointerState.active = true;
    pointerState.x = e.clientX;
    pointerState.y = e.clientY;
    pointerState.id = e.pointerId;
    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
    if (!running) startGame();
  });
  canvas.addEventListener("pointermove", (e) => {
    if (!pointerState.active || pointerState.id !== e.pointerId) return;
    pointerState.x = e.clientX;
    pointerState.y = e.clientY;
  });
  canvas.addEventListener("pointerup", (e) => {
    if (pointerState.id === e.pointerId) {
      pointerState.active = false;
      pointerState.id = null;
    }
  });
  canvas.addEventListener("pointercancel", () => {
    pointerState.active = false;
    pointerState.id = null;
  });

  function bindHold(btn, onDown, onUp) {
    let held = false;
    const down = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      held = true;
      onDown();
      btn.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId);
    };
    const up = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!held) return;
      held = false;
      onUp();
    };
    btn.addEventListener("pointerdown", down);
    btn.addEventListener("pointerup", up);
    btn.addEventListener("pointercancel", up);
    btn.addEventListener("pointerleave", up);
  }

  const rand = (a, b) => Math.random() * (b - a) + a;
  const clamp = (v, a, b) => Math.max(a, Math.min(b, v));

  let running = false;
  let gameOver = false;
  let lastTime = 0;
  let score = 0;

<script>
  (() => {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("game");
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    const scoreEl = document.getElementById("score");
    const bestEl = document.getElementById("best");
    const livesEl = document.getElementById("lives");
    const gemsEl = document.getElementById("gems");
    const totalGemsEl = document.getElementById("totalGems");
    const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay");
    const overlayTitle = document.getElementById("overlayTitle");
    const overlayText = document.getElementById("overlayText");
    const startBtn = document.getElementById("startBtn");
    const leftBtn = document.getElementById("leftBtn");
    const rightBtn = document.getElementById("rightBtn");
    const jumpBtn = document.getElementById("jumpBtn");

    let W = 0, H = 0, DPR = 1;
    let cameraX = 0, cameraY = 0;

    function resize() {
      DPR = Math.max(1, Math.min(2, window.devicePixelRatio || 1));
      W = window.innerWidth;
      H = window.innerHeight;
      canvas.width = Math.floor(W * DPR);
      canvas.height = Math.floor(H * DPR);
      canvas.style.width = W + "px";
      canvas.style.height = H + "px";
      ctx.setTransform(DPR, 0, 0, DPR, 0, 0);
      buildWorld();
    }
    window.addEventListener("resize", resize);

    const keys = new Set();
    window.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
      if (["ArrowLeft", "ArrowRight", "ArrowUp", "ArrowDown", "Space", "KeyA", "KeyD", "KeyW"].includes(e.code)) {
        e.preventDefault();
      }
      keys.add(e.code);
      if (!running && (e.code === "Enter" || e.code === "Space")) startGame();
      if ((e.code === "KeyR") && gameOver) startGame();
    }, { passive: false });
    window.addEventListener("keyup", (e) => keys.delete(e.code));

    const input = {
      left: false,
      right: false,
      jumpQueued: false,
    };

    function bindHold(btn, onDown, onUp) {
      let held = false;
      btn.addEventListener("pointerdown", (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        held = true;
        onDown();
        btn.classList.add("active");
        btn.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
      });
      const end = (e) => {
        if (!held) return;
        held = false;
        onUp();
        btn.classList.remove("active");
      };
      btn.addEventListener("pointerup", end);
      btn.addEventListener("pointercancel", end);
      btn.addEventListener("pointerleave", end);
    }

    bindHold(leftBtn, () => input.left = true, () => input.left = false);
    bindHold(rightBtn, () => input.right = true, () => input.right = false);
    jumpBtn.addEventListener("pointerdown", (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      input.jumpQueued = true;
      jumpBtn.classList.add("active");
      jumpBtn.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
    });
    const clearJump = () => {
      jumpBtn.classList.remove("active");
    };
    jumpBtn.addEventListener("pointerup", clearJump);
    jumpBtn.addEventListener("pointercancel", clearJump);
    jumpBtn.ad

        canvas.style.height = rect.height + 'px';
        ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineWidth = currentSize;
        ctx.strokeStyle = currentColor;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        if (prev) {
          const img = new Image();
          img.onload = () => {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, rect.width, rect.height);

          clearCanvas(false);

      function clearCanvas(pushHistory = true) {
        if (pushHistory) pushHistorySnapshot();
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        ctx.save();
        ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, rect.width, rect.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, rect.width, rect.height);
        ctx.restore();
        setStatus('Canvas cleared');
      }

        }

prompt: Create a drawing app with brush and color picker
snippet:
<script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const colorPicker = document.getElementById('color');
    const brushSize = document.getElementById('brushSize');
    const brushValue = document.getElementById('brushValue');
    const clearBtn = document.getElementById('clearBtn');
    const undoBtn = document.getElementById('undoBtn');
    const status = document.getElementById('status');

    let drawing = false;
    let lastX = 0;
    let lastY = 0;
    let history = [];
    const MAX_HISTORY = 25;

    function setCanvasSize() {
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
      const imageData = canvas.width && canvas.height ? ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height) : null;

      canvas.width = Math.floor(rect.width * dpr);
      canvas.height = Math.floor(rect.height * dpr);
      ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
      ctx.lineCap = 'round';
      ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

      if (imageData) {
        const temp = document.createElement('canvas');
        temp.width = imageData.width;
        temp.height = imageData.height;
        temp.getContext('2d').putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, rect.width, rect.height);
        ctx.drawImage(temp, 0, 0, imageData.width / dpr, imageData.height / dpr);
      } else {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, rect.width, rect.height);
      }
    }

    function saveState() {
      try {
        const data = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        history.push(data);
        if (history.length > MAX_HISTORY) history.shift();
        undoBtn.disabled = history.length === 0;
      } catch (e) {}
    }

    function restoreState(state) {
      if (!state) return;
      ctx.putImageData(state, 0, 0);
    }

    function getPos(e) {
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      let clientX, clientY;
      if (e.touches && e.touches.length) {
        clientX = e.touches[0].clientX;
        clientY = e.touches[0].clientY;
      } else {
        clientX = e.clientX;
        clientY = e.clientY;
      }
      return {
        x: clientX - rect.left,
        y: clientY - rect.top
      };
    }

    function beginDraw(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      drawing = true;
      const pos = getPos(e);
      lastX = pos.x;
      lastY = pos.y;
      saveState();
      status.textContent = 'Drawing...';
    }

    function draw(e) {
      if (!drawing) return;
      e.preventDefault();

      const pos = getPos(e);
      ctx.strokeStyle = colorPicker.value;
      ctx.lineWidth = parseInt(brushSize.value, 10);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
      ctx.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
      ctx.stroke();

      lastX = pos.x;
      lastY = pos.y;
    }

    function endDraw() {
      if (!drawing) return;
      drawing = false;
      status.textContent = 'Draw with mouse or touch';
    }

    brush
